message:
perf(core): cache thread hash in thread_local for zero-alloc shard selection

Replace per-call format!("{id:?}") + FNV hash with a thread_local!
cached hash. Subsequent shard_index() calls are now just a modulo
of a pre-computed constant — zero allocation, zero hashing overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
